title: [NOT READY] RPM: Allow RH image verification on Fedora and CentOS Stream
body:
This commit fetches the RH sigstore and rekor keys and also updates `/etc/containers/policy.json` to ensure image signature verification using said keys.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->
